metadata.name: Outlast — Ainok Bond-Kin gains +1/+1 counter
metadata.description: p1 controls Ainok Bond-Kin (2/1, no summoning sickness, untapped). During p1's precombat main phase with an empty stack and {1}{W} available, p1 activates Outlast by paying {1}{W} and tapping the creature. The ability goes on the stack. Both players pass priority. The Outlast ability resolves, placing one +1/+1 counter on Ainok Bond-Kin (it becomes an effective 3/2). After resolution the stack is empty and Ainok Bond-Kin is tapped with 1 +1/+1 counter.
metadata.generation_notes: Ainok Bond-Kin card definition verified at crates/engine/src/cards/defs/ainok_bond_kin.rs. Abilities: [Keyword(Outlast), Outlast { cost: {1}{W} }]. The Keyword entry is not a non-mana activated ability; AbilityDefinition::Outlast is expanded by the harness (replay_harness.rs ~1711) into ActivatedAbility { cost: { requires_tap: true, mana_cost: {1}{W} }, effect: AddCounter { Source, PlusOnePlusOne, 1 }, sorcery_speed: true }. This is the sole non-mana activated ability, so ability_index: 0. CR 702.107a: 'Outlast [cost] means [cost], {T}: Put a +1/+1 counter on this creature. Activate only as a sorcery.' Mana paid: {1}{W} = colorless: 1, white: 1. Cost includes tap — Ainok Bond-Kin becomes tapped at activation time before the ability goes on the stack (CR 602.2c). Ainok Bond-Kin remains on the battlefield after activation (no sacrifice cost). After resolution, Ainok Bond-Kin has 1 +1/+1 counter making it effective 3/2 (2+1 / 1+1). CR 121.1: +1/+1 counters add to base P/T. The static first-strike grant ability (for other creatures with counters) is a TODO in the card def and is not tested here.

script.step_note: p1 activates Outlast on Ainok Bond-Kin, paying {1}{W} and tapping it. Ability resolves — 1 +1/+1 counter is placed.

actions.description: Initial: Ainok Bond-Kin on battlefield untapped, no counters, stack empty
actions.note: Ainok Bond-Kin is untapped with no counters. p1 has {1}{W} in mana pool. Stack is empty.

CR 602.2: p1 activates Ainok Bond-Kin's Outlast ability (ability_index 0 — the sole non-mana activated ability). Cost: {1}{W} + tap. p1 pays {1}{W} from pool and taps Ainok Bond-Kin. CR 702.107a: Outlast only as a sorcery. Ability is placed on the stack.

actions.description: After activation: Outlast ability on stack, Ainok Bond-Kin tapped
actions.note: Ainok Bond-Kin is tapped (tap was part of the cost paid at activation time, CR 602.2c). The Outlast ability is on the stack awaiting resolution.
CR 116.3: Both players pass priority — top of stack resolves.

resolution.note: CR 702.107a: Outlast ability resolves — places 1 +1/+1 counter on Ainok Bond-Kin. CR 121.1: Counter adds to P/T; Ainok Bond-Kin is now effective 3/2 (base 2/1 + 1 counter).

actions.note: CR 608.2: Ability resolves. AddCounter effect places 1 +1/+1 counter on Ainok Bond-Kin (the source). Ability ceases to exist after resolution.

actions.description: Final: stack empty, Ainok Bond-Kin tapped with 1 +1/+1 counter (effective 3/2), life totals unchanged
actions.note: Ainok Bond-Kin remains on the battlefield with 1 +1/+1 counter (effective 3/2). It is tapped from the Outlast cost. No SBAs triggered. Stack is empty.
